design_rules: No table stores a complete artifact payload JSON as the primary state representation.
No generic EAV field table is used; each inferred atomic fact has its own relation.
Every relation has a declared candidate key.
Independent multivalued facts and relationships are represented in separate relations.
Object/blob artifacts are excluded from relational state except through evidence reference rows.
Reconstruction views are lossless joins over independent predicates.

blob_artifact_references.reference_policy: blob bytes remain in object storage; relational schemas may store only hashes, object keys, and evidence references

structured_state_artifacts.notes: Requests and responses bridged between an MCP host and hosted Monarchic-MCP.

reconstruction_view.name: monarchic_mcp_client__001_local_stdio_json_rpc_frames__reconstruction_v
reconstruction_view.note: Lossless join over identity, catalog version, owner, persistence, each atomic fact relation, relationship relations, and evidence references. No generic EAV table or full artifact JSON table participates.

CREATE TABLE monarchic_mcp_client__001_local_stdio_json_rpc_frames__identity (
  001_local_stdio_json_rpc_frames_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  surface_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  catalog_row_number INTEGER NOT NULL,
  classification TEXT NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (001_local_stdio_json_rpc_frames_id)
);

CREATE TABLE monarchic_mcp_client__001_local_stdio_json_rpc_frames__catalog_version (
  001_local_stdio_json_rpc_frames_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  catalog_sha256 TEXT /* digest */ NOT NULL,
  schema_version TEXT NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (001_local_stdio_json_rpc_frames_id, catalog_sha256),
  FOREIGN KEY (001_local_stdio_json_rpc_frames_id) REFERENCES monarchic_mcp_client__001_local_stdio_json_rpc_frames__identity(001_local_stdio_json_rpc_frames_id)
);

CREATE TABLE monarchic_mcp_client__001_local_stdio_json_rpc_frames__owner (
  001_local_stdio_json_rpc_frames_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  owner_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  owner_scope TEXT NOT NULL,

);

  PRIMARY KEY (001_local_stdio_json_rpc_frames_id, persistence_kind, location_pattern),
  FOREIGN KEY (001_local_stdio_json_rpc_frames_id) REFERENCES monarchic_mcp_client__001_local_stdio_json_rpc_frames__identity(001_local_stdio_json_rpc_frames_id)
